messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-552 — EPIC — Adaptive Quota & Budget Manager: unify per-provider rate/quota/budget state behind one queryable QuotaManager; do not promote directly; tracks children
What it solves: SUB-TRACKER nested under BL-545 Swarm Intelligence Layer. UMBRELLA / tracking
item (type: epic), NOT directly promotable — the coordinator promotes CHILD
slices, never this. Slice 1 (BL-553) is scoped narrow: a read-only
availability check that reuses existing cooldown/ledger state rather than
buil…
Approval context: This vision proposes a QuotaManager that owns quotas/budgets/cooldowns
"independently of the ModelFactory" and a Scheduler that asks it for
eligible models. That overlaps three things already in the
swarm-intelligence-layer family (BL-545 umbrella, operator-ordered
2026-07-22):
  - BL-525 ModelFact…
BL-552 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-552" (or "reject BL-552 <reason>") to act.
